%0 Conference Paper %A Saleh Ahmed Khan, Tiasa Mondal, Sadat Tahmeed Azad, Abdullah Jubair Bin Iqbal,
Sajid Muhaimin Chowdhury %T Internet of Things (IoT) Based Bangla Calendar Clock %B 2023 International Conference on Computer and Information Technology (ICCIT), 2023 %D 2023 %R 10.1109/ICCIT60459.2023.10441436 %U https://doi.org/10.1109/ICCIT60459.2023.10441436 %X Presents an IoT-based system for a Bangla calendar clock concept, integrating embedded sensing and connected time/calendar display logic.
